data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ — added two test cases after line 1051: (1) test_review_tier_valid_value_passes expects exit 0 for review_tier=standard (RED: current schema rejects unknown keys), (2) test_review_tier_invalid_value_fails expects exit non-zero for review_tier=ultra_deep (currently fails for wrong reason — unexpected key — should eventually fail due to enum validation)
